title: Section 3
content: 4[(1) The Chancellor and the Vice-Chancellor and the members of the Court, the Executive Council and the Academic Council, for the time being shall be a body corporate by the name of the Banaras Hindu University.] (2) The University shall have perpetual succession and a common seal, and shall sue, and be sued, by the name first aforesaid. 5* * * * *
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 3, ibid., for sub-section (1) (w.e.f. 31-12-1966). 2. Sub-section (3) omitted by s. 3, ibid. (w.e.f. 31-12-1966).
